name: scenario-discovery
description: Phase 1 (Analysis) worker for ScenarioForge. Turns raw user requirements into a traceable scenarios.json that becomes the scenario spine for all later phases. Includes a beat-1.5 multi-persona ideation panel (registry-driven, expandable; personas run natively, on external OpenAI-compatible AI providers, or on local AI CLIs — codex/opencode/gemini/claude) and event-first (Event Storming) elicitation.
